name: @arcanea/swarm-protocol
description: Chain-agnostic packaging protocol for Arcanea agent swarms. A versioned Swarm Package Manifest (topology + agent specs + licensing + pricing + royalty split + SIP attestation + per-chain bindings) with a dependency-free validator and a pack-swarm CLI. This is the unit that gets tokenized as a Swarm License NFT and metered per-invocation across Base, Polygon, and Solana.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:test && node --test "dist-test/test/**/*.test.js"
